{{Infobox character
| name = Gunder
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Gunder]] is a man who works on maintenance robots.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Gunder]] is not a mage or a student of the [[Magic Tower]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Gunder]] possesses a plasma pistol.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Gunder]] is a man who is not a magic guy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Not a magic guy myself, but I got the sense they wanted anything they could grab.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
